title: In Situ Pull-down Protein Interaction Analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"e0fld","text":"An in situ His-tag pull-down assay to test direct interactions between C1q, BAI1, and p32 demonstrates direct binding of C1q–BAI1, C1q–p32, and BAI1–p32, and that C1q-BAI1-p32 can be pulled down as a complex. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":3,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"cegok","text":"- His-tag recombinant human BAI1 (SinoBiological, 4969-BA)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"yeukd","text":"- His-tag p32 (SinoBiological, 11874-H08E)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"uegyi","text":"- Magnetic beads (Invitrogen, 10103D)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dppc2","text":"- Purified human C1q (MyBioSource, MBS147305)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ym2pl","text":"- Recombinant untagged human p32 (LSBio, LS-G3375-20)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"wromo","text":"- Binding/wash buffer (50 mM sodium phosphate, 300 mM NaCl, 0.01% Tween-20)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"jajte","text":"- Pulldown buffer (3.25 mM sodium phosphate, 70 mM NaCl, 0.01% Tween-20)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7cua5","text":"- His-elution buffer (300 mM imidazole, 50 mM sodium phosphate, 300 mM NaCl, 0.005% Tween-20)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Dissolve 5 µg of His-tag recombinant human BAI1 (SinoBiological, 4969-BA) and His-tag p32 (SinoBiological, 11874-H08E) in 1x binding/wash buffer (50 mM sodium phosphate, 300 mM NaCl, 0.01% Tween-20).
For each pull-down, immobilize the bait proteins on 2 mg of magnetic beads (Invitrogen, 10103D) in Eppendorf tube(s) by incubating on a rocker for 10 minutes at room temperature (RT).
Place tubes on a magnet (Invitrogen, 12321D) to separate beads from the buffer.
Collect the buffer containing excess bait for Western blot validation.
Wash the beads four times with 1x binding/wash buffer to remove any remaining excess bait protein.
Dissolve 5 µg of purified human C1q (MyBioSource, MBS147305) and recombinant untagged human p32 (LSBio, LS-G3375-20) in 1x pulldown buffer (3.25 mM sodium phosphate, 70 mM NaCl, 0.01% Tween-20).
Incubate the single prey proteins or combination of the prey proteins with the magnetic bead-immobilized bait in the Eppendorf tube(s) on a rocker for 15 minutes at RT.
Use a magnet to separate the beads and wash four times with 1x binding/wash buffer to remove unbound prey proteins.
Elute the bound prey and bait using his-elution buffer (300 mM imidazole, 50 mM sodium phosphate, 300 mM NaCl, 0.005% Tween-20).
Analyze the eluted samples using Western blotting to confirm interactions.
creator: Katja Piltti
